I

IndicatorsService - Interface in app.service
Service for calculating and managing financial technical indicators.
IndicatorsServiceImpl - Class in app.service.impl.indicators
Concrete implementation of the IndicatorsService responsible for processing financial data records and executing mathematical models to compute traditional technical analysis indicators.
IndicatorsServiceImpl() - Constructor for class app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl
 
IndicatorsServiceImpl.AtrCalculator - Class in app.service.impl.indicators
Internal mathematical engine modeling market volatility via Average True Range (ATR) metrics.
IndicatorsServiceImpl.CmfCalculator - Class in app.service.impl.indicators
Internal mathematical engine implementing Chaikin Money Flow (CMF) metrics.
IndicatorsServiceImpl.MacdCalculator - Class in app.service.impl.indicators
Internal mathematical engine parsing price moving convergence and divergence (MACD) attributes.
IndicatorsServiceImpl.MacdCalculator.EmaCalculator - Class in app.service.impl.indicators
Utility class tracking independent Exponential Moving Average calculations using standard smoothing multipliers.
IndicatorsServiceImpl.RsiCalculator - Class in app.service.impl.indicators
Internal mathematical engine evaluating directional velocity dynamics via Relative Strength Index (RSI) metrics.
InvisiblePanel - Class in app.gui.components
A customized JPanel subclass configured to be non-opaque.
InvisiblePanel() - Constructor for class app.gui.components.InvisiblePanel
Constructs an InvisiblePanel initialized with a GridBagLayout and transparency enabled.
InvisiblePanel(LayoutManager) - Constructor for class app.gui.components.InvisiblePanel
Constructs an InvisiblePanel with a specified layout manager, setting opacity to false.
isCacheSufficient(List<DataRecord>, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, String) - Method in class app.service.impl.datasource.YahooFinanceService
Performs a deterministic coverage verification check to confirm whether local data rows are sufficient to fulfill a specified temporal range without triggering remote handshakes.
isReady() - Method in class app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl.AtrCalculator
Checks if the required timeframe window length has been fulfilled.
isReady() - Method in class app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl.CmfCalculator
Verifies if the sliding buffer architecture is completely filled.
isReady() - Method in class app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl.MacdCalculator.EmaCalculator
Verifies if lookback baseline data context requirements have been reached.
isReady() - Method in class app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl.MacdCalculator
Checks if the longer foundational indicator timeline window has gathered sufficient data points.
isReady() - Method in class app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl.RsiCalculator
Verifies if enough raw data context has accumulated to generate valid indicator metrics.
